{{Infobox character
| name = Lotta
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Lotta]] is a twelve-year-old girl and the daughter of an administrator.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Lotta]] is a little girl who hides behind a high collar.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Lotta]] is a person [[Petal]] sent out.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
